targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(profit_usdt), 0) AS value
FROM trade_daily_profit
WHERE stat_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
  AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  AND ('$strategy' = 'All' OR strategy = '$strategy')
  AND ('$route_type' = 'All' OR route_type = '$route_type')
  AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')
  AND (
    '$exchange_filter' = 'All'
    OR exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR buy_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR sell_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR spot_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR futures_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
  )

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(profit_usdt), 0) AS value
FROM trade_daily_profit
WHERE stat_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days')::date
  AND stat_date <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  AND ('$strategy' = 'All' OR strategy = '$strategy')
  AND ('$route_type' = 'All' OR route_type = '$route_type')
  AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')
  AND (
    '$exchange_filter' = 'All'
    OR exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR buy_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR sell_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR spot_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR futures_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
  )

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(trades_count), 0) AS value
FROM trade_daily_profit
WHERE stat_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
  AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  AND ('$strategy' = 'All' OR strategy = '$strategy')
  AND ('$route_type' = 'All' OR route_type = '$route_type')
  AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')
  AND (
    '$exchange_filter' = 'All'
    OR exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR buy_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR sell_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR spot_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR futures_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
  )

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(trades_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(win_count)::double precision / SUM(trades_count) END AS value
FROM trade_daily_profit
WHERE stat_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
  AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  AND ('$strategy' = 'All' OR strategy = '$strategy')
  AND ('$route_type' = 'All' OR route_type = '$route_type')
  AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')
  AND (
    '$exchange_filter' = 'All'
    OR exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR buy_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR sell_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR spot_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR futures_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
  )

SELECT stat_date::timestamp AS time, SUM(profit_usdt) AS "Daily P&L"
FROM trade_daily_profit
WHERE stat_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
  AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  AND ('$strategy' = 'All' OR strategy = '$strategy')
  AND ('$route_type' = 'All' OR route_type = '$route_type')
  AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')
  AND (
    '$exchange_filter' = 'All'
    OR exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR buy_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR sell_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR spot_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR futures_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
  )
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT stat_date,
       SUM(profit_usdt) AS profit_usdt,
       SUM(trades_count) AS trades_count,
       SUM(win_count) AS win_count,
       SUM(loss_count) AS loss_count
FROM trade_daily_profit
WHERE stat_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
  AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  AND ('$strategy' = 'All' OR strategy = '$strategy')
  AND ('$route_type' = 'All' OR route_type = '$route_type')
  AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')
  AND (
    '$exchange_filter' = 'All'
    OR exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR buy_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR sell_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR spot_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR futures_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
  )
GROUP BY stat_date
ORDER BY stat_date DESC

SELECT symbol,
       SUM(profit_usdt) AS profit_usdt,
       SUM(trades_count) AS trades_count
FROM trade_daily_profit
WHERE stat_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
  AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  AND ('$strategy' = 'All' OR strategy = '$strategy')
  AND ('$route_type' = 'All' OR route_type = '$route_type')
  AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')
  AND (
    '$exchange_filter' = 'All'
    OR exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR buy_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR sell_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR spot_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR futures_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
  )
GROUP BY symbol
ORDER BY profit_usdt DESC
LIMIT 20

SELECT CASE
         WHEN strategy = 'triangular' THEN exchange
         WHEN strategy = 'cross_exchange' THEN buy_exchange || ' -> ' || sell_exchange
         ELSE spot_exchange || ' -> ' || futures_exchange
       END AS route,
       SUM(profit_usdt) AS profit_usdt,
       SUM(trades_count) AS trades_count
FROM trade_daily_profit
WHERE stat_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
  AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  AND ('$strategy' = 'All' OR strategy = '$strategy')
  AND ('$route_type' = 'All' OR route_type = '$route_type')
  AND ('$symbol' = 'All' OR symbol = '$symbol')
  AND (
    '$exchange_filter' = 'All'
    OR exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR buy_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR sell_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR spot_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
    OR futures_exchange = '$exchange_filter'
  )
GROUP BY route
ORDER BY profit_usdt DESC
LIMIT 20

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT strategy FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode') ORDER BY 1
list.label: Strategy
list.name: strategy
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT strategy FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode') ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT route_type FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode') ORDER BY 1

list.query: SELECT DISTINCT route_type FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode') ORDER BY 1

list.label: Symbol
list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode') ORDER BY 1

list.definition:
SELECT exchange_name FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT buy_exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE buy_exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT sell_exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE sell_exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT spot_exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE spot_exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT futures_exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE futures_exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
) exchanges ORDER BY 1
list.label: Exchange
list.name: exchange_filter
list.query:
SELECT exchange_name FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT buy_exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE buy_exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT sell_exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE sell_exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT spot_exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE spot_exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT futures_exchange AS exchange_name FROM trade_daily_profit WHERE futures_exchange <> '' AND ('$mode' = 'All' OR mode = '$mode')
) exchanges ORDER BY 1
